overall.description: First-person perspective from inside an elevated train traveling through a dystopian cyberpunk city. The journey traverses industrial districts with towering concrete structures, stops at an NCART station, then continues along a coastal waterfront with distant skyscrapers visible through the haze. Game engine footage featuring atmospheric lighting and neon signage typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train tracks through industrial district

agents.ego_description: seated on the elevated train observing the industrial cityscape through the window as it moves through the DTR industrial district

entered.detail: large industrial complex with prominent DTR signage on the roof
tall brutalist concrete building with multiple levels
multi-level highway interchange visible through the haze
tall chimney emitting smoke into the overcast sky

segments.scene_description: The train travels at speed through an industrial district, passing the DTR building and various concrete warehouses. The view shows elevated highways and industrial smokestacks through the hazy morning atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART station approach with curved arrival tracks

events.description: train begins decelerating as it approaches the station platform
train enters the covered station structure with platform becoming visible

agents.ego_description: remaining seated as the train slows down and enters the station area

entered.detail: covered train station with curved roof and support pillars
train tracks curving to align with the station platform
concrete platform edge with safety markings

segments.scene_description: The train decelerates as it approaches the NCART station, entering a covered area. The curved tracks align with the platform while the industrial buildings fade from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART station platform with train stopped and doors closed

events.description: train comes to a complete stop at the station platform
train begins to accelerate and depart from the station

agents.ego_description: waiting inside the stationary train at the platform, observing the station interior and advertisements

entered.detail: concrete station wall with large advertisement posters and digital screens
illuminated digital billboard displaying commercial content
metal seating on the platform for waiting passengers

segments.scene_description: The train is stationary at the NCART station platform with doors remaining closed. The view shows station walls with neon advertisements and platform infrastructure while the train waits for departure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district with water towers approaching coastal area

events.description: train accelerates away from the station into the industrial district

agents.ego_description: traveling past industrial water towers and factory buildings as the train gains speed along the tracks

entered.detail: large cylindrical water tank on metal support structure
low-rise industrial facility with flat roof and ventilation equipment
orange-brown weathered water tower with metal framework
network of large industrial pipes running between buildings

segments.scene_description: The train departs the station and accelerates through an industrial area featuring water towers, factory buildings, and extensive pipe infrastructure. The coastal horizon becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal waterfront with distant city skyline and arriving terminal

events.description: train begins decelerating as it approaches the destination terminal

agents.ego_description: traveling along the waterfront with views of distant skyscrapers and flying vehicles visible over the water, then slowing for arrival at the destination

notable_agents.action: flying vehicles visible in the distance over the water against the skyline

entered.detail: expansive view of the water and coastline with industrial docks
tall futuristic skyscrapers visible through the haze across the water
low-rise structures along the waterfront with various signage
large illuminated advertising displays on building facades
arrival station structure with platform and terminal building

segments.scene_description: The train travels along the coastal waterfront with expansive views of the distant city skyline and flying vehicles visible over the water. Neon billboards and waterfront buildings line the route before the train decelerates to arrive at the destination terminal.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a train as it moves from a dense industrial district through a transit hub and toward a sprawling coastal skyline. It begins by speeding past the DTR building and concrete warehouses under a hazy morning sky, before the camera decelerates as the train glides into the covered NCART station. The view remains stationary for a moment, focusing on the neon advertisements and infrastructure of the platform, before the train accelerates back into the open air past water towers and complex pipe networks. As the industrial landscape recedes, the scene opens up to a coastal waterfront where flying vehicles drift over the water and neon billboards line the route. The journey finally concludes as the train slows down, revealing a distant city skyline of towering skyscrapers against the horizon.
